sections.paragraph: Ch. i.q. Heb. שִׂבֵּר to hope. (In Targ. often for the Heb. קִוָּה, בָּטַח. Syr. ܣܒܰܪ to suppose, to think). Dan 7:25, יִסְבַּר לְהַשְׁנָיָה “he will hope (confide) that he shall change.” Vulg. putabit quod possit mutare. The sense is not badly given by Theod. ὑπονοήσει τοῦ ἀλλοιῶσαι.
